User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Turnos Manzano application.

role.description: The role of the user, determining their permissions.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents an appointment for a museum visit.

date.description: The date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startTime.description: The start time of the appointment.

endTime.description: The end time of the appointment.

responsibleName.description: Name of the person responsible for the group.

schoolName.description: Name of the school or institution visiting.

schoolEmail.description: Email of the school or institution visiting.

visitorCount.description: Number of people in the visiting group.

paid.description: Whether the appointment has been paid.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the appointment was created.

LicenseAppointment.title: LicenseAppointment
LicenseAppointment.description: Represents an appointment for a driver's license procedure.

procedureType.description: The type of license procedure (e.g., new, renewal).

documents.description: A map of document IDs to their download URLs in Firebase Storage.

ScheduleConfiguration.title: ScheduleConfiguration
ScheduleConfiguration.description: Represents the configuration for available museum appointment days and times.

blockedDates.description: A list of specific dates (YYYY-MM-DD) that are unavailable for appointments.

LicenseScheduleConfiguration.title: LicenseScheduleConfiguration
LicenseScheduleConfiguration.description: Represents the configuration for available driver's license appointment days and times.

Area.title: Area
Area.description: Defines an attention area within the municipality (e.g., 'Licencias', 'Rentas').

Desk.title: Desk
Desk.description: Represents a physical attention desk or post.

areaId.description: The ID of the area this desk belongs to.

assignedAgentId.description: The ID of the user currently assigned to this desk.

QueueTicket.title: QueueTicket
QueueTicket.description: Represents a ticket in the virtual queue for presential attention.

deskId.description: The desk that called this ticket.

originalAppointmentId.description: The ID of the original online appointment if it was a check-in.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership enables straightforward security rules based on `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores all museum appointments from all users. Access should be restricted to 'manzano_admin' role.

params.name: appointmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the appointment.

definition.description: Stores all driver's license appointments. Access should be restricted to 'license_admin' role.

params.name: licenseAppointmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the license appointment.

definition.description: Stores configurations for available museum appointment days and times. Access should be restricted to 'manzano_admin' role.

params.name: scheduleConfigurationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the schedule configuration.

definition.description: Stores configurations for available driver's license appointment times. Access should be restricted to 'license_admin' role.

params.name: licenseScheduleConfigurationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the license schedule configuration.

definition.description: Stores the different attention areas of the municipality.

params.name: areaId
params.description: The unique identifier for the area.

params.name: deskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the desk.

definition.description: Stores the real-time tickets for the attention queue.

params.name: queueTicketId
params.description: The unique identifier for the queue ticket.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed for clarity, security, and role-based access. User data is central. Museum and license appointments (and their configurations) are stored in separate top-level collections to enforce strict access control via security rules based on user roles. New collections for Areas, Desks, and QueueTickets are added to support the presential attention system.
